title: A Strange Facility Beneath the Giant Tree
description: On pages 7–9, this part follows Unknown person #7, Gunko, Gerd, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9, Luffy as The Straw Hats explore Elbaf’s strange giant-scale spaces while children, teachers, and old legends point toward the island’s deeper mysteries.
scene: The Straw Hats explore Elbaf’s strange giant-scale spaces while children, teachers, and old legends point toward the island’s deeper mysteries.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It'll be death by love! That's some- thing to look forward to, am I right?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: C'mon!! 'You're too sto! It's pathetic!

dialogue.speaker: Gunko
dialogue.text: Gunko, what route are you using?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The central path. There are other thick branches...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: OWL library

dialogue.speaker: Gerd
dialogue.text: Walrus School

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Munch Munch

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Western Village

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But making them go that way will get them to the ocean clouds I saw by the village.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Harbor

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to be in the center is to be vulnerable.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's a harsh reality to face, especially when you're too helpless to move!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Summers, this needs salt.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Salt?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ST. OILING,AM mythical dragon-dragon fruit - model: oilin (a dream-materializing man).

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: AsEach Rock Salt... Ever the connoisseur.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You can wake up now!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's the ability you used to pull those dream demons* out of the brats' heads, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Of course, I can use it multiple times simultaneously.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Clink

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: This salt is perfect!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I agree...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That ship docked at the village is meant for giants, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We should be able to make our own rainbows with a painter...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It's delicious!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What a peculiar culture...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So when we've done that, we just return to the Holy Land, and...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What? That's it?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: This game was way too easy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I'm stuffed...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Hey, is this zero calories?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, it was a dream meal... ha ha ha ha! So of course it's calorie-free!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Summers, don't let your guard down...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: trouble is brewing.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I SAW A CERTAIN PIRATE SHIP ANCHORED AT THE VILLAGE...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Emperor Straw hat Luffy is on Elbaf!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Huh!? Hey, aren't the kids heading straight for the fire?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It spread faster than I expected, but no matter.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If they die, we'll just have the next batch March over...

summary: This part advances the Elbaf Exploration through 40 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
